title: Creamy Complex Northern Irish Lamb Curry
description: A rich and aromatic curry featuring lamb, massaman curry paste, and a blend of briny and snappy flavors, perfect for a date night, this dish is also macrobiotic-friendly and incorporates dehydrated elements.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until they are browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the massaman curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the coconut milk, rehydrated seaweed, dates, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the lamb is tender, about 20 minutes.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional rehydrated seaweed and dates if desired.
